scene: Teen Byte wakes up to morning golden-pink light, sitting at his desk with the laptop, having transitioned from night sleep to active morning readiness.

subjects.description: Byte in teen stage form with gangly limbs, big expressive eyes now open and alert, small rounded body with characteristic teen proportions
subjects.position: centered at desk in primary foreground
subjects.action: sitting upright at desk, facing laptop with attentive posture, freshly awake and ready for the day

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop centered, Chicago skyline visible through window behind
subjects.position: desk center stage, window behind and to left
subjects.action: static environment anchor with laptop screen aglow

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: morning golden-pink sunlight streaming through window, warm and soft, transitioning from night to day
mood: hopeful and refreshed, energetic after restful sleep
background: room with Chicago skyline window showing morning cityscape, trophy shelf above desk with exactly one golden 10-day trophy on left side and exactly one green plant on right side with clear spacing between them, food bowl on floor to right of desk with clear spacing from desk legs
composition: Byte centered at desk, laptop prominent, window behind providing warm backlight, trophy shelf visible above
